title: Global Grain Trade Estimate Raised
summary:
Main
The United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) has released its latest trade forecast. Global grain exports for the 2020/21 cycle are now expected to total 458.9 million tons. This is 1.8 million tons more than was forecast last month and would mark a year-on-year jump of 16.7 million tons (4%) from the 457.1 million tons estimated for 2019/20.
